3 ASBGVRDT AST_BEG_VER_DT Assessment Beginning Version Date DATE 8 Beginning date of the submission file that contains the version of this assessment
4 CRRCTNNM AST_CORR_VER Assessment Correction Version Number CHAR 2 The number of the assessment. 00 = Original, 01 = First correction, 02 = Second correction, etc.
5 ASNDVRDT AST_END_VER_DT Assessment Ending Version Date DATE 8 Ending date of the submission file that contains the version of this assessment
